productDisplayName: Provogue Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal suede slip-ons with a pointed toe design from provogue adds that extra bounce to your step. Perfect for those who love to slip in and out of their footwear with ease, this pair offers comfort and style with its perforated pattern. Team it with jeans, chinos or even formal trousers for that classy look.UpperSuede leather upper for added durability and stylePointed toe design for a more stylish lookStitch detailing in definite pattern on the forefoot regionSlip-on design for easy removal and wearing of shoes with a string embellishment on the midfoot regionConcealed elastic gored on either sidesLightly padded collar for in-step comfort and a snug FitMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortLeather inner for absorbing moisture and offering dry comfortOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
